description: A plain candid field-arrest photograph with no on-image text or graphic design. Outdoors on a dirt lot under bright daylight, two ICE officers wearing tactical vests labeled 'POLICE / FEDERAL OFFICER' (one in a maroon shirt, one in gray, both masked) detain a man in a light-blue T-shirt printed with a beach/palm-tree scene; the man is being placed against a gray car and is handcuffed. A pickup truck, a marked vehicle, palm trees, and utility poles are visible in the background. The tweet describes a weeklong Harlingen, Texas enforcement operation yielding 72 arrests. This is one of several documentary operation photos, not a designed meme.
